title: Crazy Blaster
description: This mod adds Blaster to your minecraft !
body:
**WARNING! Before downloading this mod you need to download Geckolib 4 and be careful because Its alpha anything can break !**


**This mod will add Crazy blaster to the game but now its only alpha. This means The Crazy Blaster is not in the game but soon it will be. Now it adds:**

- Menu to change time using F7
- BackPack (Warning! The backpack now crash the game when right-clicked !)

## How it works ?
-If you start minecraft and open your inventory you will see something like this:
![Inventory](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/50fcd016bfa940c3774ac4d029cd44f0d851066f.png)
Now click there:
![Clicking](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/35804ff93f8759eeed874072a460827d3dd1515f.png)
and then you will see this:

![tab](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/739fb1c798e48852948a94b236b6da3ff79dae12.png)
Now if you click on that stick you will see Added items.
